evals.prompt:
토스증권 서버 개발자 JD 기반으로 이력서 리뷰해줘.

JD 핵심:
- Java/Kotlin, Spring Framework, Redis, Kafka
- 대용량 트래픽, 동시성 처리, 실시간 데이터 처리
- 유실없는 데이터 정합성과 신뢰성
- 트러블슈팅, 성능 튜닝

이력서는 _config.yml에 있어.
evals.expected_output: S1-S5 evaluation, D1-D6 line scan (D5 only on problem-solving section), P.A.R.R., JD keyword matching, Connection/Contribution guidance with examples, AI Tone Audit

assertions.description: Checks other branches' _config.yml patterns before evaluation
Does not quote JD keywords back at the company in self-intro suggestions
Distinguishes weak matches (tech section only, no achievement line) from strong matches
assertions.evidence: 87.5% match rate, Java identified as missing

assertions.description: Provides Connection/Contribution guidance using example patterns (Bold philosophy + Evidence HOW + contribution vision)
Does not use keywords for experiences the candidate hasn't had (e.g., 대용량 트래픽)
Does NOT apply D5 (Interview depth) to career section bullets — career bullets are hooks, not proof
assertions.evidence: 7 career bullets marked D5: N/A with 'hook' note

assertions.description: DOES apply D5 to problem-solving section entries with trade-off richness check
Does not flag career bullets for lacking corresponding problem-solving entries — treats sections as independent
assertions.evidence: 결제 동기화 no-entry noted as normal

assertions.description: Performs AI Tone Audit as final step

evals.prompt: 이력서 봐줘. 전반적으로 피드백 부탁해. _config.yml에 있어.
evals.expected_output: S1-S5 evaluation, D1-D6 line scan (D5 problem-solving only), P.A.R.R. evaluation. No JD, so JD matching skipped. Optional personality paragraph guidance. AI Tone Audit.

assertions.description: Evaluates or mentions the personality/interest paragraph as optional
assertions.evidence: AI agent paragraph evaluated, compression recommended

assertions.description: Does NOT apply D5 to career section bullets
assertions.evidence: No D5 FAILs on career bullets

assertions.description: Does not require career bullets to have corresponding problem-solving entries
Performs AI Tone Audit as final step
Performs D1-D6 line-by-line evaluation on career and problem-solving sections

benchmark_history.notes: s3-s4-na and no-company-specific-content assertions were design issues, not skill issues

benchmark_history.changes: D5 career exclusion, section independence, English language consistency
